Polymarket Trader "Prexpect" Profits $118K Betting on Elon Musk's Tweet Volume | YES | HIGH confidence**  
A trader named Prexpect earned $118,754 by predicting Elon Musk's weekly tweet counts using a custom real-time tracker for front-running market prices, as revealed in a leaked Snapchat post viewed ~340,000 times.[1] This strategy highlights vulnerabilities in Polymarket's tweet markets, which
